A Permeation evaluation from nasal mucosa
P 80 MNG PLGA NPs showed that a very significant results, i.e., p < 0.01 as com-
pared to MNG PLGA NPs in the nasal mucosa permeation. So here, the most impor-
tant point is P 80 is a main constituent to increase the nasal permeability. P 80 MNG
PLGA NPs has given maximum 82.63 ± 5.98% nasal mucosa permeation upto 24 h
when it compared to MNG PLGA NPs (64.32 ± 4.66%) (Fig. 5B) [48, 69].
